description: Canonical list of MCP tools exposed by the three upstreams we aggregate. Use this checklist when implementing native handlers.

filesystem.note: Tool names/descriptions match GitHub main; confirm npm bundle on upgrades.

nativeImplementation.entry: Default: python -m mcp_code runs server.py with three stdio MCP child processes (official filesystem + git + ast-grep). Set MCP_CODE_USE_NATIVE=1 for native_server.py. Set MCP_CODE_UPSTREAM_TRANSPORT=http for loopback mcp-proxy (experimental).

filesystem.name: read_file
filesystem.description: Read file as text (deprecated; use read_text_file).

filesystem.name: read_text_file
filesystem.description: Read file as text; optional head/tail line limits.

filesystem.name: read_media_file
filesystem.description: Read image/audio as base64 + MIME (png, jpeg, gif, webp, bmp, svg, mp3, wav, ogg, flac).

filesystem.name: read_multiple_files
filesystem.description: Read many files; failures per file do not abort batch.

filesystem.name: write_file
filesystem.description: Create or overwrite file with text content.

filesystem.name: edit_file
filesystem.description: Exact text replacements; optional dry-run git-style diff.

filesystem.name: search_files
filesystem.description: Recursive glob search under path with pattern and optional excludePatterns.

filesystem.name: get_file_info
filesystem.description: Stat metadata for file or directory.

filesystem.name: list_allowed_directories
filesystem.description: Lists configured allowed directory roots (here: workspace root).

git.name: git_log
git.description: Commit log with optional date filters

git.name: git_branch
git.description: List branches (local|remote|all) with optional contains filters

ast_grep.name: test_match_code_rule
ast_grep.description: Scan stdin with inline YAML rule
